properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We Are Called To Stand For Such A Time As This. We Must Fight For What Is Right, And Learn To Trust In Him. We Have A Truth To Live For A Promise To Defend. Stand Up Tall, Stand Up Proud ‘Til The Very End.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Stand Strong, Stand Firm. Press On Until The End, And Claim The Promise Of His Word. We Have Got A Message; Let’s Spread It Through The Land, Praying For The Courage To Stand.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let’s Run, But Let’s Not Hide, Proclaiming Once Again. To Fight For What’s Right, Showing Love Unto All Men. Not Fearing What May Come, Nor Looking To The Past. Trusting Everything We Are To The One Whose Love Will Last.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Standing standing Standing On the promises of God my Saviour, Standing standing Standing On the promises of God.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Praying for the courage to stand, Praying for the courage to stand.
